info.name: SegaraAnakan Hub API
info.description:
Koleksi lengkap endpoint backend SegaraAnakan Hub.

Setup:
1. Set variabel baseUrl (default: http://localhost:3000)
2. Jalankan Login di folder Auth
3. Endpoint public tidak memerlukan token

Role:
- ADMIN_KECAMATAN: akses penuh
- ADMIN_DESA: village-scoped
- KADER_DESA: monitoring air
